creator: maske@intsyst.com
text:
Diskusage program that shows current users diskusage in Kilobytes.  Please
get the port from ftp.intsyst.com/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles/diskusage.tar.gz 
and the port will automatically retrieve ftp.intsyst.com/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles/diskusage-1.00.tar.gz 
on a make; make install type diskusage and your done.
